title: alchemilla geranioides f. major
intro: Alchemilla geranioides f. major is a variety of the alpine lady's mantle plant, characterized by its larger leaves and more extensive growth habit compared to its parent species. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla geranioides f. major include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. Alchemilla geranioides f. major can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
